reasoning: XLF +0.98% and XLE +1.74% show risk-off energy/financial rotation while XLK flat at +0.07%. Energy outperforming SPY (+1.74% vs +0.29%) indicates narrow leadership and inflation pricing — not broad-based upside. Tech non-participation is bearish for sustainable SPY moves. This is defensive/inflation rotation, not growth-led. Medium confidence due to small premarket moves and unclear financial leadership direction (yield normalization bullish vs. defensive flight bearish).
key_observations: XLK: +0.07% flat — tech not participating in premarket strength
XLF: +0.98% up — financial sector showing modest strength, source unclear (yield curve vs. defensive flight)
XLE: +1.74% up — energy outperforming SPY, inflation pricing evident, typically bearish for growth equities

overall rotation: Energy + financials up with tech flat = classic risk-off/inflation rotation. Narrow leadership (energy outperforming) rather than broad. Bearish internals for sustainable SPY upside.
